candidate_definition_hints.text: Deploy a detailed DevEx metrics dashboards, combining DORA and AI adoption to show ROI. gh-devlake is a GitHub CLI extension for deploying and configuring Apache DevLake which is the platform that aggregates all these metrics easily
A [GitHub CLI extension](https://cli.github.com/manual/gh_extension) that deploys, configures, and monitors [Apache DevLake](https://github.com/apache/incubator-devlake) from the terminal.

candidate_glosses.text: A [GitHub CLI extension](https://cli.github.com/manual/gh_extension) that deploys, configures, and monitors [Apache DevLake](https://github.com/apache/incubator-devlake) from the terminal.

source_context_snippet: A [GitHub CLI extension](https://cli.github.com/manual/gh_extension) that deploys, configures, and monitors [Apache DevLake](https://github.com/apache/incubator-devlake) from the terminal.
source_repo_description: Deploy a detailed DevEx metrics dashboards, combining DORA and AI adoption to show ROI. gh-devlake is a GitHub CLI extension for deploying and configuring Apache DevLake which is the platform that aggregates all these metrics easily
